title: Run go-fed/testsuite (test.activitypub.dev) against broadside
description: The go-fed test suite at https://test.activitypub.dev is the functional replacement for the defunct W3C test suite. Tests C2S and S2S ActivityPub compliance. Point it at a running broadside instance and work through failures. Note: broadside has no C2S API, so only S2S tests apply.
close_reason: go-fed/testsuite is defunct (last commit 2020). Builds but requires second public TLS hostname and manual browser interaction. Not automatable.
